mapper.select: SELECT id, code, name, city, province, status, created_at, updated_at FROM airport WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM airport WHERE code = #{code}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO airport(code, name, city, province, status) VALUES(#{code}, #{name}, #{city}, #{province}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE airport SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
